notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, third baseman Ryan McMahon to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Taylor Ward scores. Gunnar Henderson to 3rd. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, third baseman Ryan McMahon to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Taylor Ward scores. Gunnar Henderson to 3rd. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Aaron Judge. Gunnar Henderson scores. Tyler O'Neill to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler O'Neill. Aaron Judge scores. Cody Bellinger scores. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 2nd. Jazz Chisholm Jr. advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Tyler O'Neill.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler O'Neill. Aaron Judge scores. Cody Bellinger scores. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 2nd. Jazz Chisholm Jr. advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Tyler O'Neill.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Beavers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Beavers lines out to left fielder Cody Bellinger.

notableEvents.label: Ben Rice GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Coby Mayo. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. Ben Rice out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Adley Rutschman. José Caballero scores. Trent Grisham to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: J.C. Escarra GIDP
notableEvents.detail: J.C. Escarra grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Coby Mayo. Jasson Domínguez out at 2nd. J.C. Escarra out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Ben Rice. Taylor Ward to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Ben Rice.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler O'Neill. Aaron Judge scores. Cody Bellinger scores. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 2nd. Jazz Chisholm Jr. advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Tyler O'Neill.
